dashboard.speedLimitDialogDesc: This shares the same settings config with Settings - Transfer, leave blank for unlimited.
dashboard.emptyFilterTasks: No tasks in the current category

settings.title: Settings
settings.navGeneralDesc: Storage path, startup behavior, and general system window preferences.
settings.navTransferDesc: Concurrency limits, speed control, proxy, and network security parameters.
settings.navMagnetDesc: BitTorrent connections, network discovery, and automatic Tracker updates.
settings.navCategoryDesc: Task categorization filtering and custom file mapping icons.
settings.navExtensionDesc: Browser download integration services and security token settings.
settings.navAppearanceDesc: Themes, backgrounds, fonts, and notification sound effects.
settings.languageSettingDesc: Choose the display language for the app. When set to "Auto", it follows the system language preference.
settings.datetimeFormatSettingDesc: Choose the date and time format for the list. The year will only be displayed when crossing years.
settings.downloadStorageDesc: Set default save directory for new tasks. It is recommended to use a separate download folder.
settings.autoStartDesc: Start downloading immediately after creating a task; if turned off, the task stays paused initially.
settings.autoRemoveOnFileDeletedDesc: If the local file is deleted or moved, the download task is automatically removed.
settings.autoStartOnBootDesc: Automatically start the application when the computer boots up.
settings.autoCategoryDesc: Automatically assign categories according to file extensions.
settings.categoryManagerDesc: Automatically categorize tasks by domain, suffix, keywords, size, and paths.
settings.tagManagerDesc: Tags refine categories, directing specific downloads within a category to custom sub-folders.
settings.transferConcurrencyDesc: Controls the count of tasks downloading concurrently to prevent disk or network overload.
settings.speedDisplayUnitDesc: Only affects dashboard/float/global displays. Limit inputs are still saved in KB/s.
settings.downloadSpeedLimitDesc: Leave empty for unlimited; otherwise limits the global download bandwidth.
settings.uploadSpeedLimitDesc: Leave empty for unlimited; applies to Magnet/P2P upload rates.
settings.limitUnitHint: Speed limits are strictly configured in KB/s; the display unit above is for display purposes only.
settings.windowBehaviorDesc: Determines close button action and background running settings.
settings.closeActionMinimizeDesc: Minimize main window to taskbar on close, keeping downloads active.
settings.closeActionTrayDesc: Hide main window to system tray on close, keeping downloads active.
settings.closeActionExitDesc: Quit the application immediately upon closing.
settings.floatWindowSettingsDesc: Configure floating widgets and velocity globes display criteria.
settings.minimizeOnCloseWithTasks: Minimize on Close with Active Tasks
settings.minimizeOnCloseWithTasksDesc: Automatically minimize to taskbar if active downloads exist, preventing accidental exits.
settings.enableNotificationsDesc: Receive system native notification dialogs when downloads succeed or fail.
settings.integrationHint1: If you keep the app downloading in the background, keeping 'Hide to Tray' makes restoring quicker.
settings.integrationHint2: If device bandwidth or disk writing is slow, try limiting concurrent tasks or applying speed caps.
settings.appearanceThemeDesc: These settings adhere strictly to the global design system.
settings.lightModeToggleDesc: Switch the theme to a light glassmorphic view with high-contrast accents.
settings.fontLazyLoadHint: Scans system directories for fonts upon menu drop-down.
settings.fontLoadFallback: Failed to read system fonts, using fallback default fonts.
settings.effectsToggleDesc: Toggle backgrounds particles, scanlines, and glow rendering.
settings.soundToggleDesc: Enable sounds for clicks, warnings, and error triggers.
settings.soundChimeDesc: Configure interaction feedback tones and completion notification sounds.
settings.soundPlayCompleteDesc: Audibly ring a chime when download succeeds or seeding starts.
settings.soundSelectDesc: Choose the sound effect to play when a download finishes. Click Audition to preview.
settings.magnetDesc: Configure BitTorrent protocols, port listening, peer loops, and network discovery.
settings.enableDhtDesc: Enables decentralized peer discovery via distributed hash tables without Trackers.
settings.enablePexDesc: Allow peers to share locally discovered user lists to accelerate transfer rates.
settings.enableLpdDesc: Enables local network multicast discovery, suitable for internal LAN speeds.
settings.listenPortDesc: TCP/UDP port range assigned for incoming BitTorrent protocol handshake listeners.
settings.encryptionPolicyDesc: Set protocol encryption level preferences for incoming and outgoing connections.
settings.diskAllocationDesc: Select pre-allocation schemes for new downloads to avoid file fragmentation.
settings.seedRatioThresholdDesc: Automatically halt seeding when download reaches this ratio (uploaded bytes / downloaded bytes).
settings.peerLoopIntervalDesc: BitTorrent engine tick interval for peer interactions. Smaller numbers increase speed responsiveness but consume more CPU.
settings.trackerSubscribeDesc: Specify Tracker list subscription URLs. Updates can be pulled dynamically via the right-side button.
settings.trackerListDesc: List of Tracker servers automatically appended to new torrents, one per line.
settings.updatingDesc: Fetching updated Tracker lists from subscription url...
settings.updateSuccessDesc: Successfully fetched and merged {{count}} Tracker servers.
settings.copySuccessDesc: Theme JSON template copied to clipboard. Paste to save local files before modifications.
settings.bgImportSuccessDesc: Successfully imported and applied background asset
settings.bgDownloadSuccessDesc: Successfully downloaded and applied background asset
settings.resetDesc: This will revert your preferences to factory defaults and point to the system default download directory. Changes auto-save immediately.
settings.errFileFormatNotSupportedDesc: Only PNG or SVG format icons are supported
settings.errImageLoadFailedDesc: Please check if the uploaded file is corrupted
settings.errEnterFileFormat: Please enter the file format to associate
settings.errEnterValidFileFormat: Please enter a valid file format
settings.iconSaveSuccessDesc: New file icon mapping has been added
settings.iconDeleteSuccessDesc: The icon mapping has been removed
settings.exportSuccessDesc: Theme template "{themeName}" has been successfully exported as a JSON file
settings.errInvalidThemeTemplate: Invalid theme template file: missing core properties (id, name, styles)
settings.importSuccessThemeDesc: Theme template "{fileName}" has been successfully imported and is ready to use
settings.browserExtIntegrationDesc: Allow Chrome/Chromium extensions to initiate new download tasks via HTTP server. When disabled, extensions will no longer capture browser downloads.
settings.portAndTokenDesc: Listening port and identity credentials used for HTTP communication between the application and the browser extension (changes to port require restarting the app).
settings.globalSpeedLimitDesc: Set maximum rate limits for global downloading and uploading. Leave empty for unlimited.
settings.maxConnectionsPerTaskDesc: Maximum number of parallel connections (chunks) for each HTTP/HTTPS task, used for segmented parallel downloading.
settings.globalProxyDesc: Configure global HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS5 proxy, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:7890 or socks5://127.0.0.1:7890; leave blank to disable proxy.
settings.ignoreSslErrorsDesc: Allow gosh-dl to accept invalid HTTPS certificates. This switch saves with settings and is read by gosh-dl HTTP client on restart. Recommended only for trusted intranets, self-signed sources, or temporary troubleshooting.
settings.maxDownloadRetriesDesc: HTTP max_retries passed to gosh-dl for handling network fluctuations or server errors. This value saves with settings and is read on restart.
settings.globalUserAgentDesc: Default User-Agent for new HTTP/HTTPS tasks; individual task advanced settings will override this value.
settings.borderlessClickThroughDesc: Hide the top title bar and background assets, turning transparent areas into click-through desktop viewports.
settings.disableWindowShadowDesc: Call Win32 API to hide system window shadows (often used with Borderless Click-Through mode to prevent shadow artifacts of transparent windows).
settings.onlineBgUrlPlaceholder: Paste the URL of an online image or video...
settings.backgroundBlurDesc: Adjust the blur radius of the background to enhance readability of foreground text.
settings.backgroundOpacityDesc: Adjust background opacity to reveal the desktop underneath (requires window transparency support).
settings.backgroundMaskColorDesc: Set the overlay mask color on top of the background.
settings.backgroundMaskOpacityDesc: Adjust the opacity of the background mask overlay.
settings.fileIconManagementDesc: Configure custom file icons (PNG or SVG) for specific file formats, with optional SVG color adjustment.
settings.noCustomIconMapping: No custom icon mappings configured. Click Add Mapping to add one.
settings.associatedFileFormatsPlaceholder: e.g., mp4, mkv, avi (separated by spaces or commas)
settings.associatedFileFormatsDesc: Enter target file extension names, separated by commas or spaces, e.g., `zip rar 7z`
settings.iconFileRequirement: File size must not exceed 200KB; PNG resolution must not exceed 512x512 pixels

newTask.title: New Download Task

advanced.autoVerifyDesc: Perform hash validation on downloaded files
advanced.privateTorrentForce: Private torrent detected, forced to protect privacy
advanced.privateTorrentTip: Recommended for private torrents to protect privacy
advanced.uaPlaceholder: Leave blank to inherit global UA

newTask.errorAlert: Failed to create download task. Verify connectivity or destination paths.
newTask.metadataProbeDesc: Probing filename and classification via HTTP headers. This may take longer on slow servers, but you can proceed and confirm task creation.
newTask.metadataProbeFallback: No metadata resolved. Proceeding using parsed link strings.

conflict.warning: ⚠️ Duplicate file or folder already exists in directory
conflict.dialogDesc: A file with the same name already exists in the target directory. Choose how to proceed.

taskCard.preparingHint: Connecting to server and allocating .part files. This may take longer for huge files or slow disk writes.

floatDisc.title: Double click to show main window / Drop torrents or URLs to start downloading
